microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned drill execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation standard across cloud infrastructure.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, coordinating across security, networking, and cloud architecture teams.

Scaled team leverage through AI-driven automation by building an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows, reducing **planning cycle time by 39%** and increasing annual drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Designed and delivered technical solution briefings to enterprise stakeholders, translating complex cloud resilience architectures into clear business-value narratives that accelerated executive buy-in and informed deployment best practices.
microsoft_2023: Championed **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting user demos and hands-on training sessions that drove utilization across 14 Azure service teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly in documentation overhead.

Influenced the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating 11+ structured user interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating field feedback into prioritized technical requirements.

Optimized **data integrity and retrieval** by enforcing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search platform, cutting average lookup time by 83% and improving solution discoverability across teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ engineering and operations teams across the organization.

Mobilized a product strategy to eliminate manual operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual effort** per region and building a phased roadmap to automate the highest-impact paths.

Enabled leadership to pinpoint automation gaps and allocate resources effectively by **engineering a Power BI dashboard** that visualized operational toil metrics and deployment bottlenecks across 140+ teams in real time.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping software and hardware dependencies across 1,200+ robotics stations, and sequencing rollout to minimize disruption.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process across cross-functional engineering and operations teams.

Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, reducing manual deployment steps and accelerating the software release cycle by 25% across the robotics platform.
pro_painters: Increased **job bookings by 26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a structured CRM process that improved pipeline visibility and reduced proposal turnaround time.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the company website, Google Business profile, and paid search presence.

Strengthened leadership pricing decisions by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ historical project records, identifying margin leaks and recommending corrective pricing adjustments that improved overall job-level margins.

tailoring_notes: Wove in 'deployment best practices' and 'business-value narratives' (JD: 'Provide best practices related to deployment and administration') into microsoft_ft bullet#6 to mirror Esri's SE storytelling responsibility.

Used 'solution discoverability' and 'field feedback into technical requirements' in microsoft_2023 bullet#2 to echo JD language around 'technical consulting and conceptual solution design' and understanding customer needs.

Embedded 'cloud infrastructure,' 'networking,' and 'security' (JD: 'ArcGIS from an IT context — hardware, storage, security, networking, virtualization, cloud computing') into microsoft_ft bullets#3 and #4 to directly mirror the IT-context requirement.

Framed amazon_robotics bullet#1 around 'software and hardware dependencies' and 'rollout sequencing' to reflect JD's 'troubleshoot client issues related to Esri application deployment and system architecture' recommended qualifier.

Added microsoft_ft bullet#6 as a new SE-facing bullet explicitly about technical briefings and translating architecture into business value, directly mapping to JD responsibilities: 'Present technical demonstrations' and 'design presentations for technical and non-technical customers.'
